textByHash.7d7814e5286eef565b5a6ee5dd29e224c3e4b721: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.
textByHash.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
textByHash.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHash.f46fcc44227c17e12dde36af9bc2572386792bb7: Well, it's nice to have someone to talk to.
textByHash.9db88b85182babd43f803daa16e71c9829c72ca1: Ollie is so remote, and I can't get up the courage to talk to him...
textByHash.f16263c95ce731087a379470e90a7b8986be7203: He's the camel wandering around near that glider.
textByHash.9ededebea7abb29bd5e58f9de0fdffff872ecc78: Isn't he so strong-looking and handsome?
textByHash.1d6ad7f4c2eb9532616b6e9202c43f99898600bf: How can you not see how wonderful he is?
textByHash.b46dabc607eaf1d9567c4b108e8540eeacccfa2d: Why, he can cross the Kharidian Desert in three bounds, and he's so strong that he could haul the brick for the Emir's Arena in only a day!
textByHash.5fbc0f8f8fd5e5e256a61634edfeb7d526d95030: For someone who understands camel speech, you're not good at these things.
